meta.title: YF-23 vs. F-22: Why the Air Force Chose the Raptor
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Northrop’s YF-23 Black Widow II has grown into something of a legend in recent years, as the only fighter ever to truly give the F-22 Raptor (or at least its prototype) a run for its money, but why did it really lose out in the ATF competition of 1990?
